summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Portal JUST Downloader - Romanian company file download application. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend fully functional with real-time updates, and integration between frontend/backend working seamlessly. Application successfully downloads company legal files from portalquery.just.ro across 62 Romanian judicial institutions.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Health check returns proper message
GET /api/config - Configuration retrieval with all required fields
PUT /api/config - Configuration updates working correctly
POST /api/search - Company search preview (tested with DEDEMAN - 26 results)
GET /api/stats - Statistics display correctly (runs, files, storage)
GET /api/files - File listing shows 2 downloaded JSON files
GET /api/runs - Run history retrieval working
GET /api/runs/current - Current job status tracking
GET /api/institutions - All 62 Romanian judicial institutions listed
File download functionality - Downloads work correctly
POST /api/run - Manual job trigger successful
Frontend dashboard loads and displays all sections
Stats cards show real-time data (2 runs, 2 files, 3.41MB)
Configuration form allows company name and schedule setting
Search preview displays results correctly (26 dosare found)
Save configuration button works with success notification
Files section lists downloaded files with metadata
Download buttons open files in new tab/download
Delete buttons present and accessible
Run history shows completed jobs with timestamps
Real-time updates - stats update as jobs complete
Responsive design works on tablet and mobile viewports
Keyboard navigation (Tab key) works correctly
Job execution status displays when active
